Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-19-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee CSR: B. Fields #7235

Mike Mengarelli, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Jean Phleger.
No appearance by defendant Michael Edison.

Default was entered against defendant on March 28, 2006.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 22, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Jean Phleger, and against the Defaulted Defendant Michael Edison as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,477.218.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $247,721.87.
for a total judgment in the amount of $2,724,940.57
